description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large glass windows along the main facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. A spacious patio area surrounds a rectangular swimming pool, with a secondary structure adjacent to the main building, possibly serving as a pool house or garage. The exterior is finished in light-colored concrete or stucco, complemented by sleek metal or wood accents. The overall layout is elongated, with clean lines and open spaces, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics. The design is well-suited for urban or suburban neighborhoods, offering both privacy and outdoor leisure areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a spacious patio, and a rectangular swimming pool, featuring minimalist lines and light exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building with large windows, the pool in the foreground, and the secondary structure to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building, the pool, and the adjacent secondary structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the elongated layout, the pool area, and the back of the secondary structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, the side of the main building, and the secondary structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows
